Introduction
    Biblia Koshodô no Jiken Techô is a movie starring Haru Kuroki, Shûhei Nomura, and Masahiro Higashide. Kamakura south of Tokyo has a special book store, which is operated by Shioriko. She loves her books, her store and stocks...
